grant_title: George F. and Sybil H. Fuller Foundation Annual Giving
project_area: Culture, Education, Healthcare, Social Services, Religious Institutions (with focus on youth-serving organizations ages 0-22)
demographic_requirements: Priority given to programs serving youth ages 0-22
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations with 501(c)(3) status located in Worcester or Boylston, Massachusetts are eligible. Must focus on operational/programmatic needs (not capital projects) and serve youth (0-22) or align with priority areas (culture, education, healthcare, social services, religious institutions). Initial phone inquiry required before formal application.
